roles.core: central bot, D1 authority, payment callbacks, report outbox and Durable Object live usage engine
roles.edge: reseller bots, customer miniapps and imported-subscription lifecycle
roles.processor: optional advanced schedules, backups, campaigns and background reports

core: LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR -> class LiveUsageCoordinator (required for cron-free live usage)

features: creates release_rollouts and system_error_center immediately before the first staged-deployment write
the emergency bootstrap does not trust the cached schemaReady flag or an older db_schema_revision marker
prevents D1_ERROR no such table release_rollouts from aborting GitHub-to-Cloudflare deployment
retains the full 3.3.1 schema revision guard and all 3.3 growth, loyalty, health and automation features

deployment.migration_tag: v3.1.9-live-usage (unchanged; no new Durable Object migration)
deployment.automatic_provisioning: supported after the one-time legacy D1 bootstrap or a manual Core deployment
deployment.activation: for an already-failing 3.3.0 runtime, create release_rollouts once in D1 or manually deploy the new Core, then deploy all three workers
deployment.cron: the existing 10-minute central cron can remain; it is not used for live usage while the Durable Object binding is active

limitations: a currently deployed 3.3.0 Core fails before it can deploy a patched Core if release_rollouts is absent; run the included one-time SQL in D1 or manually deploy core/worker.js once
representative low-balance automation does not charge a bank card without a payment mandate
QR subscription import is optional and sends the selected QR image to the external qrserver decoder endpoint
automatic failover must be explicitly enabled by the reseller
